# passwork_vault (Resource)

Manages a Passwork vault.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "passwork_vault" "example" {
  name = "Production Secrets"
}

# Import existing vault:
# terraform import passwork_vault.example <vault-id>
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Display name of the vault.

### Optional

- `type_id` (String) Vault type template ID. Required when the server has the `vaultType` feature enabled.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Vault identifier.
